name.description: Name of the resource. The name must be 1-63 characters long, and comply with RFC1035. Specifically, the name must be 1-63 characters long and match the regular expression `[a-z]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?` which means the first character must be a lowercase letter, and all following characters must be a dash, lowercase letter, or digit, except the last character, which cannot be a dash.

shared_secret.description: Shared secret used to set the secure session between the Cloud VPN gateway and the peer VPN gateway. **Note**: This property is sensitive and will not be displayed in the plan.

description.description: An optional description of this resource.

target_vpn_gateway.description: URL of the Target VPN gateway with which this VPN tunnel is associated.

vpn_gateway.description: URL of the VPN gateway with which this VPN tunnel is associated. This must be used if a High Availability VPN gateway resource is created. This field must reference a `google_compute_ha_vpn_gateway` resource.

vpn_gateway_interface.description: The interface ID of the VPN gateway with which this VPN tunnel is associated.

peer_external_gateway.description: URL of the peer side external VPN gateway to which this VPN tunnel is connected.

peer_external_gateway_interface.description: The interface ID of the external VPN gateway to which this VPN tunnel is connected.

peer_gcp_gateway.description: URL of the peer side HA GCP VPN gateway to which this VPN tunnel is connected. If provided, the VPN tunnel will automatically use the same vpn_gateway_interface ID in the peer GCP VPN gateway. This field must reference a `google_compute_ha_vpn_gateway` resource.

router.description: URL of router resource to be used for dynamic routing.

peer_ip.description: IP address of the peer VPN gateway. Only IPv4 is supported.

ike_version.description: IKE protocol version to use when establishing the VPN tunnel with peer VPN gateway. Acceptable IKE versions are 1 or 2. Default version is 2.

local_traffic_selector.description: Local traffic selector to use when establishing the VPN tunnel with peer VPN gateway. The value should be a CIDR formatted string, for example `192.168.0.0/16`. The ranges should be disjoint. Only IPv4 is supported.

remote_traffic_selector.description: Remote traffic selector to use when establishing the VPN tunnel with peer VPN gateway. The value should be a CIDR formatted string, for example `192.168.0.0/16`. The ranges should be disjoint. Only IPv4 is supported.

labels.description: Labels to apply to this VpnTunnel. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

cipher_suite.description: , [Beta](https://terraform.io/docs/providers/google/guides/provider_versions.html)) User specified list of ciphers to use for the phase 1 and phase 2 of the IKE protocol. Structure is [documented below](#nested_cipher_suite).

phase1.description: , [Beta](https://terraform.io/docs/providers/google/guides/provider_versions.html)) Cipher configuration for phase 1 of the IKE protocol. Structure is [documented below](#nested_cipher_suite_phase1).

phase2.description: , [Beta](https://terraform.io/docs/providers/google/guides/provider_versions.html)) Cipher configuration for phase 2 of the IKE protocol. Structure is [documented below](#nested_cipher_suite_phase2).

region.description: The region where the tunnel is located. If unset, is set to the region of `target_vpn_gateway`.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
